mentions.note: JPM favorite for 2026; returned 80% last year but still trades <12x next year earnings. New CEO David Joyner doing remarkable job; Medicare Advantage rates favorable; retail pharmacy normalizing. Opportunity for continued delivery at higher multiples.
Better than UnitedHealth with Aetna integrated; David Joyner has cleaned up problems; higher yield makes it preferred healthcare pick.
Better than UNH; higher yield; includes Aetna; David Joyner cleaned up problems; preferred healthcare play over UNH.
Health insurance business tumbled 14% on Medicare Advantage rate freeze; insurance division facing structural margin pressure.
Managed care company (Aetna); hammered on Medicare Advantage reimbursement; CEO David Joiner terrific; only national drugstore left; reports Tuesday, fascing time to own.
Higher quality alternative to Oddity; acceptable entry point.
David Joyner 'real deal' building national drugstore chain; CVS and Joyner both legitimate; hold or buy on Joyner's execution.
Trading 11x earnings with 8,932 drug stores; consolidation play as Rite Aid gone and Walgreens private. Solid company, good quarter, protected from AI disruption.
David Joyner doing great job fixing CVS while Rite Aid closed & Walgreens self-immolating. Aetna buried within CVS should drive good numbers; stock run a lot but still worth monitoring.
Five quarters of Aetna improvement; beat and raise; Health 100 app launching to reduce healthcare friction; up 7.7% to 3-year high.
